questions.question: Simplify √(36x²). Assume x ≥ 0.
questions.explanation: √(36x²) = √36 · √(x²) = 6 · x = 6x. Take the square root of each factor separately.

questions.question: Solve for x: √x = 5
questions.explanation: Square both sides: (√x)² = 5², so x = 25. Check: √25 = 5 ✓

questions.question: Simplify (3/(2x)) + (1/(2x)).
questions.explanation: Both fractions have the same denominator: (3 + 1)/(2x) = 4/(2x) = 2/x.

questions.question: Simplify √(16/25).
questions.explanation: √(16/25) = √16/√25 = 4/5. Take the square root of numerator and denominator separately.
